description: Your Splunk SIEM is suffering performance degradation because junior SOC analysts are running untargeted, 'All Time' queries across all indexes. Restructure the SOC's access model using Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) in the Splunk web interface (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!). Create a base role named 'soc_tier1' that inherits from the 'user' role, restricts index access to only 'security_logs' and 'web_logs', limits concurrent search jobs to 2, and sets a maximum search time window of 7 days (604800 seconds). Additionally, create an elevated role named 'soc_tier2' that inherits from 'soc_tier1', increases the concurrent search limit to 6, and sets an infinite (0) search time window.
